resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a completion certificate contingent on 80% attendance. However, the evidence provided does not include concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the attendance tracking mechanism or the issuance of the certificate based on attendance. The linked use case mentions that Sarah attended 11 out of 12 sessions, but it does not explicitly demonstrate how the system verifies this attendance or issues the certificate, leading to a gap in fulfilling the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of how the system tracks attendance per session or issues a completion certificate based on attendance.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
